news-global-econ.title: Mortgage Rates Decline for Third Straight Week, Offering Relief Ahead of Spring Buying Season
news-global-econ.description:
Borrowing costs for U.S. homebuyers continued their downward slide, with the benchmark 30-year fixed mortgage rate falling to 6.23 percent from 6.3 percent a week earlier.

news-global-econ.title: Warren confronted on calling controversial senate candidate Graham Platner her 'kind of man'
news-global-econ.description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren was confronted over backing Maine Senate candidate Graham Platner, who faced scrutiny over a reported Nazi symbol chest tattoo, and saying he's her "kind of man."

news-global-econ.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX Reaches $60 Billion Deal for Right to Acquire AI Coding Start-up Cursor
news-global-econ.description:
Elon Musk's SpaceX has secured an agreement granting it the option to acquire Cursor, a rapidly growing AI coding start-up, for $60 billion as the rocket maker pushes deeper into AI ahead of its hotly anticipated IPO.

news-global-soc.title: A piece of the UFC White House event’s setup is sitting in Pennsylvania Amish country
news-global-soc.description: UFC Freedom 250's massive stage structure called The Claw is being assembled in Pennsylvania Amish country near Lititz before moving to the White House.
